lane_stats.seasonality_notes: Hurricane risk Jun-Nov. Consistent retail demand year-round.
disclaimers: These are modeled estimates, not guaranteed quotes.
Actual rates depend on freight details, accessorials, and current market conditions.

service_notes: Real-time scan events at pickup, in-transit, and delivery
Pallet-level tracking with delivery appointment scheduling
Exception alerts within 30 minutes of status change

faq_seeds.q: How long does LTL freight take from Miami to Orlando?
faq_seeds.a: Estimated transit is 1-2 business days on this ~243-mile lane. Actual times depend on carrier routing and weather.

faq_seeds.q: How much does LTL shipping from Miami to Orlando cost?
faq_seeds.a: Modeled LTL rates range from $615 to $820 depending on freight details. Get an instant quote for real-time pricing.

faq_seeds.q: What equipment is available on the Miami to Orlando lane?
faq_seeds.a: Common equipment includes Dry Van, Reefer (temp-controlled). Availability varies by season and demand.

faq_seeds.q: Can we start with just this lane before expanding?
faq_seeds.a: Yes. A single-lane pilot lets you validate performance before committing to additional corridors.

faq_seeds.q: How does WARP handle exceptions on this LTL lane?
faq_seeds.a: WARP detects exceptions automatically with alerts within 30 minutes of any status change.
